message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox

actor User as U
control server as S
database user as DB

U -> S : 1 POST /sign-up with body: email and password
activate S
S -> DB : 2 Check email existence
activate DB

alt [Email existed]
DB --> S : 3 Error code
deactivate DB
S --> U : 4 Error message
else [Email is new]
DB --> S : 5 Email is available
deactivate DB

S -> S : 6 Hash password

S -> DB : 7 Store email and hashed password
activate DB
DB --> S : 8 Store complete
deactivate DB

S --> U : 9 Success message
end

deactivate S
@enduml
```
